sampleNotice: Offline demo fixture for local review workflow verification. Replace with live App Store collection or user-provided JSON/CSV for formal evidence.

reviews.title: Hard to cancel
reviews.body: I liked a few workouts but I could not figure out how to cancel the subscription from inside the app. It kept showing upgrade screens and I felt trapped.
reviews.author: Avery

reviews.title: Too many subscription prompts
reviews.body: The exercises are fine, but almost every screen pushes premium. I wanted to try a beginner plan before paying.
reviews.author: HomeGymUser

reviews.title: Great short workouts
reviews.body: The seven minute routines are easy to follow and perfect when I only have a small window before work.
reviews.author: Mia

reviews.title: Audio timing is off
reviews.body: The coach voice sometimes announces the next move after the timer already changed. It makes the workout confusing.
reviews.author: RunnerMom

reviews.title: Needs better modifications
reviews.body: I need low impact alternatives for knee pain. Some workouts show jumping moves without an obvious substitute.
reviews.author: Jess

reviews.title: Progress disappeared
reviews.body: After the last update my completed days reset to zero. I lost my streak and do not trust the tracker now.
reviews.author: FitAgain

reviews.title: Good plans but reminders are noisy
reviews.body: The plan helped me keep a routine, but notification reminders come too often and I could not tune them by day.
reviews.author: Lena

reviews.title: Beginner level is not beginner
reviews.body: The first workout had burpees and mountain climbers. For a beginner plan it felt intimidating and I quit halfway.
reviews.author: NewStarter

reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.body: I like that I can start quickly and see each move. The animations are clear and the workouts fit at home.
reviews.author: Sam

reviews.title: Charged unexpectedly
reviews.body: I thought I was starting a free trial but I was charged. The trial and renewal language needs to be much clearer.
reviews.author: TrialUser
